def positive_untracked_create_task_result_may_hide_exception():
    rule_id = "untracked_create_task_result_may_hide_exception"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "asyncio.create_task result discarded without storing a reference; exceptions raised in the task are silenced."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
